attributes.description: Mountpoint capacity, used bytes, and inode headroom to prevent runaway growth.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type":"markdown","embeddableConfig":{"content":"## [System Host OTel] Filesystem

Per-mountpoint space and inode foot-print from the host metrics stream to catch capacity and inode fatigue.
- Used, free, and reserved space as bytes in stacked trends
- Same breakdown for inode usage where reported
- Tables ordered by the largest used bytes and inode use","hide_title":true,"settings":{"open_links_in_new_tab":true}},"panelIndex":"85415beb-d700-48f0-bf95-78a75bb2faa7","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"85415beb-d700-48f0-bf95-78a75bb2faa7"}},{"type":"vis","embeddableConfig":{"title":"m1","hide_title":true,"attributes":{"visualizationType":"lnsMetric","title":"","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"layer_0":{"index":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*-d80f053c8c7ebd8743ee5b46d70355ee22671ead19dfbb14be1c4e0824863a36","query":{"esql":"TS metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "hostmetricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE `system.filesystem.usage` IS NOT NULL AND attributes.state == "used"
| STATS uby = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(`system.filesystem.usage`)) BY m = attributes.mountpoint
| STATS tused2 = SUM(uby)"},"columns":[{"columnId":"metric_accessor_metric","fieldName":"tused2","label":"Bytes used all mounts","customLabel":true,"params":{"format":{"id":"bytes","params":{"decimals":2}}},"meta":{"type":"number"}}]}}}},"internalReferences":[{"type":"index-pattern","id":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*-d80f053c8c7ebd8743ee5b46d70355ee22671ead19dfbb14be1c4e0824863a36","name":"indexpattern-datasource-layer-layer_0"}],"visualization":{"layerId":"layer_0","layerType":"data","metricAccessor":"metric_accessor_metric","subtitle":"","showBar":false},"adHocDataViews":{"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*-d80f053c8c7ebd8743ee5b46d70355ee22671ead19dfbb14be1c4e0824863a36":{"id":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*-d80f053c8c7ebd8743ee5b46d70355ee22671ead19dfbb14be1c4e0824863a36","title":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*","name":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*","sourceFilters":[],"fieldFormats":{},"runtimeFieldMap":{},"fieldAttrs":{},"allowNoIndex":false,"allowHidden":false,"type":"esql"}},"query":{"esql":"TS metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*
